title: Huawei 10G SFP+ optical transceiver, MM, 850nm, 0,3km, 2x LC konektor, DDM
description: The Huawei OMXD30000 is a multi-mode 10G SFP+ module with a wavelength of 850nm and two LC connectors for connections up to 0,3km The LC connectors in the SFP module have UPC polishing
